missingInCode.key: 数据一致性评分为 ${value}，标准差为 ${stdDevPercent.toFixed(2)}%
系统健康度为 ${value}，基于 ${validPrices.length} 个数据源
发现 ${highRiskAnomalies.length} 个高风险价格异常，偏差超过 3%。建议立即检查相关预言机数据源。
检测到 ${mediumRiskAnomalies.length} 个中等风险的价格偏差（1-3%）。建议监控这些数据源的表现。
共有 ${anomalies.length} 个数据源报告异常。这可能表明市场波动剧烈或存在系统性问题。
${staleDataAnomalies.length} 个预言机数据更新延迟超过 5 分钟。这可能影响价格准确性。
当前数据完整性为 ${completeness.toFixed(1)}%，低于 80% 阈值。部分预言机可能无法提供有效数据。
检测到最高 ${maxDeviation.toFixed(2)}% 的价格偏差。各预言机之间的价格一致性较差。
价格在短时间内变化 ${changePercent.toFixed(2)}%，超过阈值 ${PRICE_CHANGE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT}%
时间戳 ${new Date(timestamp).toISOString()} 在当前时间之后
数据距今已 ${ageMinutes} 分钟，超过最大有效期 ${Math.floor(maxAgeMs / 60000)} 分钟
Comprehensive security audit by Trail of Bits completed with no critical findings.
Slashing conditions optimized to improve economic security incentives.
Brief sync delay resolved within 5 minutes. No slashing occurred.
Total value staked through RedStone AVS exceeded 100M ETH.
RedStone core contracts passed Certora formal verification and OpenZeppelin security audit with no critical vulnerabilities found.
Released RedStone Core v2.0 with more efficient data compression and lower gas costs.
Node operators exceeded 150, covering 30+ countries and regions, significantly improving decentralization.
Due to extreme market volatility, some asset price feeds experienced brief deviations. Team responded quickly and restored normal operation within 15 minutes.
RedStone officially launched on Ethereum mainnet, providing decentralized data feeds for DeFi protocols.
White hat hackers reported a low-severity vulnerability through the Bug Bounty program, which was fixed during the testnet phase.
Multiple audits by leading security firms including Certora and OpenZeppelin. No critical vulnerabilities found.
Decentralized node network with reputation system and economic incentives through staking.
Newer protocol with shorter track record compared to established oracles. Token economics still evolving.
Potential regulatory changes in DeFi sector and emerging oracle services classification.
Proposal to increase the minimum staking requirement for validators from 10,000 UMA to 15,000 UMA to enhance network security and validator commitment.
Upgrade UMA Optimistic Oracle to V2.5, introducing new dispute resolution mechanisms and faster finality times.
Proposal to allocate 500,000 UMA from treasury for ecosystem development fund to support UMA-based projects.
Modify dispute fee structure to lower participation threshold for small disputes while maintaining deterrence against malicious disputes.
Fund development of community governance dashboard providing better proposal tracking and voting analysis tools.
Uses elliptic curve cryptography (ECVRF) to generate verifiable random outputs that cannot be predicted or manipulated.
Every random value comes with a cryptographic proof that can be verified on-chain by anyone.
Multiple independent oracle nodes participate in randomness generation, eliminating single points of failure.
Each request includes a unique nonce and consumer address to prevent replay attacks.
Invalid request ID format. Expected 66-character hex string starting with 0x
Invalid request data. Check action and alertIds fields.
Invalid request data. Check name, config_type, and config_data fields.
Invalid request data. Check symbol, selected_oracles, price_data, and stats fields.
The requested resource was not found.
Please sign in to access this feature.
Too many requests. Please try again later.
Connection failed. Please check your internet connection.
Coverage pool collateralization target adjusted to ${coverageData.collateralizationRatio.toFixed(1)}%
${deviation.symbol} dAPI 价格与市场价格偏差达到 ${deviation.deviation.toFixed(2)}%，超过临界阈值 ${criticalValue}%
${deviation.symbol} dAPI 价格与市场价格偏差达到 ${deviation.deviation.toFixed(2)}%，建议关注
平均响应时间 ${airnodeStats.avgResponseTime}ms 超过阈值 ${responseTimeThreshold.threshold}ms
节点在线率 ${airnodeStats.nodeUptime}% 低于正常水平
覆盖池抵押率 ${coveragePercent.toFixed(1)}% 低于阈值 ${ratioThreshold.threshold}%，建议增加质押
覆盖池抵押率 ${coveragePool.collateralizationRatio}% 低于 100%，存在偿付风险
DeFiLlama API is unreachable: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}
FCP is ${metrics.fcp.toFixed(0)}ms, which is above the recommended 1.8s
LCP is ${metrics.lcp.toFixed(0)}ms, which is above the recommended 2.5s
FID is ${metrics.fid.toFixed(0)}ms, which is above the recommended 100ms
